description_long: This is a small, single-story house with a flat, overhanging roof and a stone foundation. The front features a short set of stone steps leading up to a covered porch with a wooden railing and a recessed entryway. A large, yellow-trimmed window is present on the left side of the front facade, providing natural light to the interior. The side view reveals another window with similar yellow trim, while the back and opposite side are plain with no visible openings. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, and the roof is constructed from wide, light-colored wooden boards. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A small, single-story house with a flat roof, stone foundation, and a covered porch with yellow-trimmed windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, entryway, stone steps, railing, and a large yellow-trimmed window.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the yellow-trimmed window and the depth of the porch area.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain wooden siding and no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing plain siding and the edge of the porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with stone steps, covered porch, and wooden railing
